description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Template that accepts board, max_size, and max_size_apa102 as inputs. The workflow should run on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python 3.11, and installing UV. It then compiles and checks the size of a board with Blink and Apa102 examples, inspects the binary and ELF files, generates a timestamp and random hex, and uploads the build log as an artifact. If the build fails, the workflow should exit with a non-zero status.
